gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.causal_polytope` (Eidometry thesis, section Experiments).

For the two-node confounded (bow) causal model under the fullest interrogation, the forced quotient of its state space is equivalent — as a genuine equivalence of types, not merely an inclusion — to the full probability simplex over response types. The polytope is forced by the construction, with no response-type object supplied in advance.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1196].

statement.pretty: Quotient (WMSpec.Transform.wordBisim {id} (WMSpec.Transform.rtFam (Bool × Bool × Bool))) ≃ ↑(stdSimplex ℝ (Bool × Bool × Bool))

title: Eidometry.Thesis.causal_polytope
